value.found_quote: **File System**: Commands can only write to your designated workspace directory and essential system locations. This prevents the Agent from accidentally deleting or modifying files outside your project.
value.rationale: The page, under Terminal Sandboxing > Restrictions, describes a File System restriction whereby sandboxed commands can only write to the designated workspace directory and essential system locations. This matches the claim. The feature is presented as a current capability of Antigravity (Google), though sandboxing is disabled by default.
